posts.title: Publishing a Hexo Site to gh-pages
posts.text: This tutorial shows you how to publish a Hexo site to a project page in Github. This assumes that you already have a repository set up. Update your Hexo configurationSet your public directory to ‘docs’ in _config.yml: 1public_dir: docs Set the url and root appropriately: 12url: https://timothyylim.github.io/wikiroot: /wiki/ Generate the site: 1$ hexo g Push to your repo and set the github pages to point to /docs.
